theme: Spend a compute budget across rival solvers
title: Rival-Solver Portfolio: Schedule a Shared Step Budget Across Four Deterministic Solvers
strategies: fixed default solver, even per-case share, case order (baseline recipe)
single globally-best-on-average solver, funded fully on every case in case order
per-case argmin solver (reads the feature interaction) funded in case order
per-case argmin solver, scheduled by ascending cost so the shared budget buys the most solved cases (exchange argument)
